case_title: WILTON MARSHALL VS. AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-16-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF WILTON MARSHALL. DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY, REPRESENTED BY SONYA SABANAC VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT IN COURT AT THE TIME COURT PROCEEDINGS BEGIN AT 9:00 A.M. AND THE COURT DISMISSES THIS MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDCE FOR NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARSHALL, WILTON

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY MARSHALL, WILTON AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
